payload.description: The memories section of FeedbackAnalysis report output is ~116KB and growing, which risks hitting DynamoDB's 400KB item size limit. The memories data should be offloaded to S3 as an attachment, similar to how indexed_items_file already works for score details. In plexus/reports/blocks/feedback_analysis.py: (1) serialize the memories dict to a YAML file, (2) upload it via attach_detail_file() to get an S3 key, (3) replace the inline memories: section in the output with a memories_file: key pointing to the S3 path. The frontend FeedbackAnalysis.tsx must then lazily fetch and parse memories_file when needed before merging topics into scores.
payload.title: Move memories data to S3 attachment to avoid DynamoDB size limit
